Ø Each change of awkward details (for example: overdimension / weight) causes
Following steps may help to smoothen the process of new application but are
Ø Finally changed over-dimensions (as well as dimension and weight of single
pieces) have to be advised to OOCL immediately, latest until VGM-cut off.
Ø Booking, booked over-dimensions, cargo dimension and picked up container
are linked and related to each other. Any mix up of containers must be
advised to OOCL immediately, latest until VGM- cut off.
Ø Type of stowage must be advised: overwidth centered / one side only.
If oversize both sides is not centered i. e. due to “center of gravity” –
overwidth of both sides must be announced.
Ø Costs which may accrue due to incorrect or belated information will be
charged for account of cargo. Announced over-dimension will be roughly
checked against actual over-dimensions at time of full gate in at terminal (port
of loading). Any findings may result in non-shipment and/or costs.
